title: ts.alert.v1
description: Canonical TradingView → bridge alert payload. Authored by trading-charting; verified by trading-bridge (Phase 3). Pine emits this JSON via alert(); the bridge treats client_order_id as the idempotency key and verifies the HMAC signature.

client_order_id.description: Idempotency key — unique per intended order.

account_track.description: Tax/venue track: cfd (VT Markets) or spreadbet (IG, tax-free).

secret.description: Shared token (weak). Pair with HMAC signature.

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 hex over the canonical body.

then.description: Entries need ATR so the bridge/risk-gate can size the position.
